title: Corner Portal Linking
description: Use Glazed Terracotta to tell Minecraft how your portals should link!
body:
This mod helps you tell the game how Nether portals that are in the same area should connect.

![](https://i.imgur.com/5Ka5N0W.png)

It's really simple:
- You put Glazed Terracotta in the corners to create a pattern. 
- The portal on the other side that matches that pattern best is selected. 
- Otherwise it defaults to the one chosen in vanilla.

If you need to know more:
- The horizontal orientation of the pattern does not matter (see the example, the blue-red one is flipped).
- When several destination portals match, the one that matches more blocks wins.
- If there is still a tie, the best portal is picked with normal vanilla priority.
- When no Glazed Terracotta is set up, portals work like in vanilla.
